items.question: Can I become a multimillionaire playing croquet?
items.answer: Um. No. Probably not. But if you are one, its definitely the game to play.  Along with Elephant Polo. Also, who doesn't like throwing into the conversation that they are heading to 'my club'?

items.question: Is croquet hard to pick up?
items.answer: Seriously?  Have you seen our captain?

items.question: Is there a uniform?
items.answer:
No of course not.  Wear whatever you feel comfortable in.

As long as its white.  And linen. And Fabulous.

We have personal shoppers and stylists available should you need some pointers.  Just have a (very) quiet word with the ladies' captain.

items.question: Is this club serious?
items.answer: Define serious?  We mostly all have jobs There are some children, plants and pets. They are all currently alive.

items.question: Where do you play?
items.answer:
We are currently looking for a new home.

We are open to anywhere with good grass, ground staff, a pool, a bar, air conditioning, parking, a sauna, a hammam, a jetty, a runway and an in-house band.

items.question: When can I play
items.answer:
Hopefully soon! There are lots of ways to get involved.

Checkout the [Events page](https://dubaicroquet.com/events/) for details of our next meeting.

items.question: Is it free to play?
items.answer:
You are aware this is Dubai, right?

Hey, we want this to be inclusive so generally if there is a charge it will be shared by us all just to cover costs.

items.question: I am a member of another croquet club, can I play?
items.answer: The bar is low my friend. Be prepared to be flexible on the rules but all are welcome! Come show us how it's done.

sections.title: Join Our Mailing List
sections.text: Sign up today to be kept up-to-date on all the latest croquet chit chat
